chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 503 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of MA No.4231/2024 (S/A) 18-09-2025 Mr. Manoj Kumar Tejwani, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>>..<<<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant submits that since the case has been challaned, therefore, under instructions, he does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, which is not opposed by learned Assistant PG. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI/PS
